text: I find myself moving from a silent, glass-walled room—tidy, clinical, expectant—into a space alive with color and ideas. The shift from the muted order of the meeting space to the vibrant intellectual energy of the R+D wall is striking. Here, I feel a sense of curiosity awaken; the presence of research and possibility invites exploration. Where the meeting room felt almost isolating, this new zone buzzes with the potential for discovery and human creativity. I sense anticipation, mingled with the quiet wonder that often accompanies the birth of a new thought.
